title: 3D U-Net: Learning Dense Volumetric Segmentation from Sparse Annotation
note: Provides the 3D U-Net backbone idea for volumetric and spatiotemporal generation.

title: Video Diffusion Models
note: Foundational video diffusion model framing and sampling basics.

title: Imagen Video: High Definition Video Generation with Diffusion Models
note: Shows cascaded high-definition text-to-video generation with diffusion models.

title: Make-A-Video: Text-to-Video Generation without Text-Video Data
note: Uses image-text and unlabeled video data to reduce the need for paired text-video training.

title: Align your Latents: High-Resolution Video Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models
note: Moves video diffusion into latent space for more efficient high-resolution synthesis.

title: Tune-A-Video: One-Shot Tuning of Image Diffusion Models for Text-to-Video Generation
sections: 6. Adapting image diffusion models to video
note: Adapts image diffusion models to videos through one-shot tuning.

title: Text2Video-Zero: Text-to-image diffusion models are zero-shot video generators
sections: 6. Adapting image diffusion models to video
note: Shows training-free adaptation of text-to-image diffusion models to video generation.

title: Lumiere: A Space-Time Diffusion Model for Video Generation
note: Introduces a space-time diffusion architecture for coherent video generation.
